headline: Sonos Ace wireless headphones are steeply discounted
summary: Sonos Ace headphones are now on sale for $279. Save $120 on these active noise-canceling headphones. Available at major retailers like Amazon, Best Buy, and Sonos.

headline: The PocketMage resurrects the PDA with an e-paper screen
summary: The PocketMage is a new clamshell PDA bringing back the classic device. It features a tactile keyboard and a modern e-paper screen. Talisman Design is crowdfunding this retro-tech revival.

headline: Sony brings back the superzoom RX10 with a stacked sensor and a high price
summary: Sony revives its RX10 superzoom camera after a nine-year hiatus. The new RX10 V boasts a stacked 20.1MP 1-inch sensor for improved performance. It retains the powerful 24-600mm equivalent Zeiss zoom lens.

headline: Comcast is breaking up with NBCU. Why did it ever buy it in the first place?
summary: Comcast announced a split, separating its broadband and NBCUniversal entertainment divisions. This move comes after years of combining content and internet services. A podcast explores the reasons behind the original acquisition and the current breakup.

headline: The Weirdest Soccer Games of All Time
summary: Discover bizarre soccer games featuring unique concepts. From platformers with football legends to Godzilla vs. Gundam matchups. Explore the most unconventional sports titles ever made.

headline: Nickelodeon’s San Diego Comic-Con 2026 Plans Include a Slime-Fueled Outdoor Experience
summary: Nickelodeon is bringing a massive, slime-soaked experience to SDCC. Attendees can visit the "Fun-Ergy Factory" inside and "Fun Flows Here" outdoors. Expect a big, interactive presence from the network.

headline: Scream Operator: Haunted House Manager Announced for PC
summary: New PC game "Scream Operator" lets you manage a haunted house attraction. Operate, upgrade, and maintain your frightful establishment from the control booth. Fulfill your dream of running a spooky theme park ride.

headline: Former Dragon Age Lead Writer Says BioWare's Fantasy Series is Unlikely to Ever Return Under EA — Though He Knows What He'd Do With Dragon Age 5 if He Made It
summary: Ex-Dragon Age lead writer David Gaider is pessimistic about the series' future under EA. He shared ideas for a potential Dragon Age 5, despite the doubts. The fate of BioWare's fantasy RPG remains uncertain.

headline: Traffic through Strait of Hormuz falls steeply after new US-Iran strikes
summary: Ship traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has significantly decreased. The decline follows recent US-Iran strikes in the region. Many vessels carrying oil and gas are affected.

headline: No contact from UK about on-the-run murder suspect, say Zimbabwe police
summary: Zimbabwean police confirm no UK contact regarding a murder suspect. Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma reportedly fled the UK on a British passport. He departed Heathrow Airport last Saturday.

headline: 'Heartbroken' Catherine Zeta-Jones leads tributes to singer Bonnie Tyler
summary: Catherine Zeta-Jones expressed her heartbreak, leading tributes to singer Bonnie Tyler. Tyler was celebrated for iconic hits like "Total Eclipse of the Heart" and "Holding on for a Hero." The news community mourns the loss of the beloved Welsh singer.

headline: Restore Britain leader describes Dunblane school shooting as 'one murder'
summary: Restore Britain leader Rupert Lowe controversially downplayed the Dunblane shooting. He described the tragic event as "one murder," criticizing handgun bans. His comments sparked outrage regarding the historical tragedy.
